title: Shiny's Mashup Pack
body: Shiny's Mashup Pack This pack is a collected of almost every vanilla-styled pack I've made! The only exceptions are things that have a specific style or things that contradict each other (Such as my villager stats & villager levels packs). I love using this pack and seeing all the variation and changes to mobs, and I hope you do too! ShinyDragon96 - Owner, Textures, Models, Organizer Complete Simplistic Pack — ShiNeaL's Simplastic Pack Realistic Entities — Shiny's Entity Models Plus! Mob Vote Mobs — Shiny's Mob Vote Revival Green Screens — Shiny's Green Screens! Shiny's Mashup Pack© 2022 by ShinyDragon96 is licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0! - If you use this pack in a video, post, or anything else, it must be linked back to here & credited in my name - !
